name: thebrain
description: Cognitive layer for Claude Code — code navigation, conversation recall, safety hooks, behavioral learning

scripts.test: node --test hippocampus/test/*.test.js cerebral-cortex-v2/test/*.test.js hypothalamus/test/*.test.js scripts/test/*.test.js dlpfc/test/*.test.js test/*.test.js
scripts.setup: echo 'Run Claude with --plugin-dir pointing here, then tell Claude: set up thebrain'
